Name: adaptive_block_size
Title: Adaptive Block Size: Dynamic Context Window Adjustment for Efficient Training
Experiment: Modify the model to dynamically adjust its block size during training, starting with a smaller block size and gradually increasing it. This could potentially lead to faster initial training and better long-range dependency learning.

Name: layerwise_learning_rates
Title: Layer-wise Learning Rate Adaptation: Optimizing Training Dynamics in Transformer Models
Experiment: Implement layer-wise learning rates, where each transformer layer has its own learning rate. Modify the configure_optimizers function to assign different learning rates to different layers, with deeper layers having lower learning rates. Compare the training dynamics, convergence speed, and final performance with the baseline model.

Name: curriculum_learning
Title: Curriculum Learning: Gradual Sequence Length Increase for Efficient Language Model Training
Experiment: Implement curriculum learning by training the model with shorter sequences initially and gradually increasing the sequence length. Modify the get_batch function to support dynamic block size increases. Evaluate the training dynamics, convergence speed, and final performance against the baseline model without curriculum learning.

Name: entropy_regularization
Title: Entropy Regularization: Encouraging Exploration in Language Model Training
Experiment: Modify the `forward` method in the `GPT` class to include an entropy regularization term in the loss function. Compute the entropy of the logits using the formula -sum(p * log(p)), where p is the softmax of the logits. Introduce a regularization coefficient (lambda) to balance the original loss and the entropy term. The final loss will be computed as: final_loss = original_loss + lambda * entropy_loss. Evaluate the impact on training dynamics, validation loss, and inference quality.
